waiting.title: Please wait
waiting.description: The presenter will open the next question shortly.

control.title: Poll control
control.description: Turn questions on for participants to answer. Off questions stay listed here but are skipped on the poll page.
control.updateFailed: Could not update question visibility. Please try again.
control.loadFailed: Could not load poll control. Please refresh.

errors.required: Please answer this question before continuing.
errors.persistFailed: We could not save your answer. Please try again.
errors.questionClosed: This question just closed. Wait for the presenter to open the next one.
errors.pollNotAccepting: The poll is not accepting answers right now. Please wait for the presenter.
errors.resultsLoadFailed: We could not load live results. Please try again.
errors.missingApiConfig: This poll cannot be saved right now. Please try again later.
